label: 第157話
source_locator: 単行本18巻 目次 p.87
summary_short: 伏黒は綺羅羅を拘束して事情を説明する。虎杖は秤の攻撃を避けずに受け続け、自分たちへ協力してほしいという熱意を示す。
summary_full: 拘束された綺羅羅へ伏黒は、五条が封印され、夜蛾が死亡し、死滅回游で津美紀が危機にあることを説明する。一方、虎杖は秤へ反撃せず、何度殴られても立ち上がって協力を求め続ける。虎杖が自分を「役割を果たす部品」と捉えていることに秤は違和感を抱くが、死んだ仲間のために戦おうとする異常な熱を感じ取る。伏黒たちが部屋へ入り、伏黒は土下座して秤へ正式に助力を求める。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 恵 has managed to stop 綺羅羅 and bring their scuffle to an end. Before 恵's able to ask for help, 秤 's conflict with 悠仁 reaches its climax. With the only goal being to ask for 秤's aid, 悠仁 stops resisting and decides to remain resolute until 秤 breaks. However, before 秤 can ever even consider agreeing to help, 悠仁 must prove he's got the fever to entice him.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 恵 lets 綺羅羅 go and begs for them to listen. 恵 dispels 玉犬: 渾 while restraining 綺羅羅 and simply asks them to please listen. Still skeptical, 綺羅羅 asks if 恵 could've really planned to use 玉犬 to restrain them. 綺羅羅 doesn't think 恵 could've known whether he or the 式神 would've gotten pulled. 恵 admits he took a gamble but now he knows that the one with the higher 呪力 output does the attracting. Initially, 玉犬 pulled 恵 but the opposite occurred when 恵 reinforced his body with 呪力. 綺羅羅 says that 恵 isn't very cute for a first-year but he suddenly lets them go. 恵 prostrates himself and begs 綺羅羅 to listen because there's no time. Confused as to why 恵 would release them, 綺羅羅 decides to believe him and agrees to listen. However, the monitor room door comes suddenly flying off the hinges and 悠仁 with it. 恵 notices 悠仁 has been hit outside the room and パンダ comically laments about how he wasn't any real help to 恵. 悠仁 allows himself to endure a beatdown at the hands of 秤. 秤 walks outside and irritation is written all over his facial expression. 悠仁 tells 恵 and パンダ to stay out of it, prompting 秤 to believe he's being underestimated. He immediately throws a devastating punch that smashes 悠仁's face and sends him reeling across the roof. 恵, パンダ, and even 綺羅羅 are troubled by how hard the hit is. 秤 notices that 悠仁 isn't even resisting and the first-year gets back to his feet before completely falling to the ground. 悠仁 defiantly blows the blood out of his nose and 秤 comments that he's nuts, noting that his adversary doesn't even intend to dodge. This isn't a life or death battle like in 渋谷 ,  so 悠仁 won't dodge or fight back anymore until 秤 breaks. 悠仁 refuses to stay down and resolves to be resilient until 秤 breaks. 悠仁's lack of resistance all but confirms he's not a spy, so 秤 says he'll hear 悠仁 out on the condition he can remain standing. 秤 flares up his 呪力 and 綺羅羅 urges him to listen out of concern for 悠仁, telling him that they just want his help. 秤 claims that he just said he'll listen and then asks 悠仁 why he's asking him for help specifically. 悠仁 says that all his senpai have confirmed 秤 is strong, annoying him. 秤 punches 悠仁 again and while he's reeling through the air again, 悠仁 compares 秤's reinforced punches to getting hit with a serrated bat. Irritated, 秤 yells at 悠仁, stating that sorcerers understand asking one another for a favor is tantamount to asking someone to put their life on the line. In order for 秤 to take such a risk, he needs 悠仁 to prove here and now that he has the fever to convince him. " But senpai... what's your function? " 秤 is annoyed because 悠仁 came to Tochigi on someone else's orders and says Principal 夜蛾 should be weeding out weaklings like him. 悠仁 claims he doesn't have any fever and says he's just a cog, a cog in a machine that sorcerers need to eliminate 呪霊 . 秤 finds this answer extremely boring and windes up another punch, prompting 恵 to express his concern for 悠仁, believing he can't afford to get hit anymore. 秤 strikes 悠仁 with the hardest blow yet, sending him flying across the roof into the wall and appearing to incapacitate him. 秤 reveals that 五条悟 has said his 呪力 has an edge to it, hence the cutting sensation 悠仁 was experiencing from getting hit. 秤 begins to tell 恵 and パンダ to grab 悠仁 and leave, but 悠仁 suddenly reappears behind him. 秤 is genuinely surprised and backs up, wondering how he's still standing after suffering three blows unguarded. He asks 悠仁 what he is and the first-year repeats he's just a cog. 悠仁 believes his function is getting rid of curses since 秤 is necessary for that, 悠仁 declares he won't stop til he agrees. Then 悠仁 gets back in 秤's face, looks him in the eye and asks him senpai what his function is. 秤 meets 悠仁's gaze and asks himself if this is the look of a cog in fever. He wants to keep punching 悠仁 but 綺羅羅 interrupts to get 秤's attention. 綺羅羅 points out that 悠仁 is burning with fever. 綺羅羅 asks 秤 if 悠仁's fever is burning hot enough for him yet, surprising 秤. He recognizes that 綺羅羅's point is undeniable, acknowledging that it's true and that the fever never lies. 秤 suddenly agrees to hear 悠仁 out and tells 恵 and パンダ he's finally willing to cut a deal. 恵 and パンダ are supremely confused as to what just occurred, as 恵 doesn't at all understand how things got resolved all of a sudden. He asks 綺羅羅 if what they said convinced him, which they confirm. 綺羅羅 reveals that while they still hate the higher-ups, they still recognize that 秤's fever burned the hottest while he was helping people at 呪術高専 .
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 伏黒恵 星綺羅羅 パンダ 虎杖悠仁 秤金次 真人 (回想) 夜蛾正道 (言及のみ)
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: ガチンコファイトクラブ
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 虎杖悠仁 vs. 秤金次 (終了)

key_events_verified_phase8: 伏黒が綺羅羅へ五条封印と死滅回游を説明する
虎杖が反撃せず秤の攻撃を受け続ける
秤が虎杖の熱を認め始める
伏黒が秤へ土下座して協力を求める
verification_notes_phase8: 集英社公式16～18巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第八段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
